Activity.name: Aged, Blind, and Disabled (ABD) Groups

Action.expression: Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.newUnique [text = Individual.first + ' ' + Individual.last +' meets non financial eligibility criteria for the class of assistance - '+ cellValue]

Action.naturalLanguage: Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.newUnique[text = Individual.familyOrHousehold.familyName + ' family has ' + Individual.familyOrHousehold.familySize.toString + ' members, is under federal poverty line if their net household income is less than ' + Individual.familyOrHousehold.FPLValue.toString]
Action.expression: Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.newUnique[text = Individual.familyOrHousehold.familyName + ' family has ' + Individual.familyOrHousehold.familySize.toString + ' members, is under federal poverty line if their net household income is less than ' + Individual.familyOrHousehold.FPLValue.toString]

Action.naturalLanguage: Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.newUnique[text = Individual.familyOrHousehold.familyName +' family has a net household income which is ' +(Individual.familyOrHousehold.householdPercentFPL*100).toString + ' % of the federal poverty level.']
Action.expression: Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.newUnique[text = Individual.familyOrHousehold.familyName +' family has a net household income which is ' +(Individual.familyOrHousehold.householdPercentFPL*100).toString + ' % of the federal poverty level.']

Action.expression: Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.newUnique [text = 'Income threshold for the ' + COA.name + ' class of assistance is ' + COA.incomeThreshold.toString + ' . Resource limit is $' + COA.resourceThreshold.toString +'.']

Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.new[text = 'Income threshold for the ' + COA.name + ' class of assistance is $' + COA.incomeThreshold.toString + ' , subject to a minimum number of hours performing a qualifying activity per month.']

Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.newUnique [text = cellValue]
Action.value: Individual.first + ' '+ Individual.last+ '\'s household has net annual income of $' + Individual.familyOrHousehold.annualIncome.toString + ', which surpasses the requisite income limit for the ' + Individual.classOfAssistance.name + ' class of assistance for households of their size, $' + Individual.classOfAssistance.incomeThreshold.toString + '.'

Action.expression: Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.newUnique [text = cellValue]
Action.value: Individual.first + ' '+ Individual.last+ '\'s household has net resources of $' + Individual.familyOrHousehold.netResources.toString + ' , which surpasses the requisite resource limit for the ' + Individual.classOfAssistance.name + ' class of assistance for households of their size, $' + Individual.classOfAssistance.resourceThreshold.toString + '.'

Action.expression: Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.newUnique [text = cellValue]
Action.value: Individual.first + ' '+ Individual.last+ '\'s household has net annual income of $' + Individual.familyOrHousehold.annualIncome.toString + ', which meets requisite income limit for the ' + Individual.classOfAssistance.name + ' class of assistance for households of their size, $' + Individual.classOfAssistance.incomeThreshold.toString + '.'

Action.expression: Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.newUnique [text = cellValue]
Action.value: Individual.first + ' '+ Individual.last+ '\'s household has net resources of $' + Individual.familyOrHousehold.netResources.toString + ' , which meets requisite resource limit for the ' + Individual.classOfAssistance.name + ' class of assistance for households of their size, $' + Individual.classOfAssistance.resourceThreshold.toString + '.'

Action.expression: Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.newUnique [text = cellValue]
Action.value: Individual.first + ' '+ Individual.last+ ' is eligible for the ' + Individual.classOfAssistance.name + ' class of assistance.'

Action.expression: Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.newUnique [text = cellValue]
Action.value: Individual.first + ' '+ Individual.last+ ' is ineligible for the ' + Individual.classOfAssistance.name + ' class of assistance, as they have not met the minimum hours per month of qualifying activities.'

Action.expression: Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.newUnique [text = cellValue]
Action.value: Individual.first + ' '+ Individual.last+ 'is eligible for the ' + Individual.classOfAssistance.name + ' class of assistance.'

Action.expression: Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.newUnique [text = cellValue]
Action.value: Individual.first + ' '+ Individual.last+ 'is ineligible for the ' + Individual.classOfAssistance.name + ' class of assistance due to income.'

Action.expression: Individual.eligibilityNote+=EligibilityNote.newUnique [text = cellValue]
Action.value: Individual.first + ' '+ Individual.last+ ' is ineligible for the ' + Individual.classOfAssistance.name + ' class of assistance due to household resources.'

Condition.value: 'New Options Waiver and Comprehensive Supports Waiver Program'
'Low Income Subsidy (Extra Help for Medicare Part D)'
